title: Resident Technical Officer (Architectural)
description:
Job summary:

  • Permanent role

  • Basic Up to $7,000

  • 5.5 days (Alternate Full Saturday)

  • Working location at West

Job scope:

  • Oversee on-site architectural activities to ensure works carried out align with the intended design, approved specifications, and mandatory regulatory requirements.

  • Work closely with C&S and M&E teams to ensure architectural elements are properly coordinated; flag any inconsistencies or technical issues to the Resident Architect or Superintending Officer without delay.

  • Manage the submission workflow for architectural-related materials, finishes, and samples, ensuring they are prepared and endorsed within the required timeline.

  • Review actual site conditions and identify gaps or conflicts between construction drawings and the physical environment prior to starting any work.

  • Perform routine checks on ongoing works to verify workmanship quality and compliance with established standards.

  • Keep proper records of all site-related matters, including inspection documentation, test results, and project correspondence

Requirements:

  • Valid Resident Technical Officer (RTO) accreditation with IES (Institution of Engineers Singapore).

  • Solid understanding of how architectural components are put together, along with practical knowledge of materials, regulatory requirements, and compliance standards related to safety and local authorities.

  • Able to manage and work with various technical documents, including construction submissions, revised drawings, project records, inspection-related paperwork, and implementation procedures.

  • Effective in conveying information, coordinating with different parties on-site or off-site, and preparing concise updates or documentation when needed.


Please submit your updated resume by using the

APPLY NOW BUTTON

By submitting your personal data and/or resume to us in connection with your job application, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us in collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal data and/or resume to prospective employers for the purpose of the evaluating, processing and administration by company relating to this job application.

*We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates would be notified* We wish you all the best in your career search.

You are welcome to visit our website at http://www.rkgroup.sg/

  • Contract & Temporary Placement
  • Executive Search
  • Work Pass & Payroll Services
  • Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO)
